name: degraded_onset_small_correction_should_accept
description: Failure-window onset: score 13.6 is over the 6.0 gate, but the correction is 1.0 m / 1.8 deg against a 0.5 s old prediction. Ground-truth analysis of this window shows even the true pose scores ~9.6 here; rejecting this row starts a 300-row reject streak.
